title: Radosław Sikorski on Office Hours
summary: Radosław Sikorski (@sikorskiradek), former Foreign Minister and Defense Minister of Poland and a Fisher Family Fellow with the Future of Diplomacy Project, talks with Aroop Mukharji (@aroopmukharji) about the rise of right-wing nationalism, Russia, and gastrodiplomacy.
body: Gallery 1 of 4 Radek Sikorski: If America’s in Decline, What’s Next? 2 of 4 Radek Sikorski: Right Wing Nationalism in Europe 3 of 4 Radek Sikorski: Gastrodiplomacy 4 of 4 Radek Sikorski: The Million-Plus Twitter Followers Club Subscribe to the Office Hours Podcast iTunes | Google Play | Stitcher | Pocket Cast | TuneIn The latest from Belfer See more Radosław Sikorski on Office Hours Print Diplomacy Europe Europe and the Transatlantic Relationship Future of Diplomacy Project North America Related Radoslaw Sikorski More From This Expert Radosław Sikorski on Office Hours Podcast Up Next Presentations Move 37 Presentation at the Global AI Impact Summit, February 20, 2026 Feb. 20, 2026 From Emerging Technology, Scientific Advancement, and Global Policy Photo Credit Toggle MSC Event Summary Rupture: (Re)thinking Middle Powers in a Fragmented World Feb. 14, 2026 The Problem of China in the British Foreign Office Mind by Oliver Yule-Smith December 2025

_list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: The article features a podcast episode with Radosław Sikorski, a Polish politician and former Foreign Minister, discussing key geopolitical issues. The conversation likely centers on the state of transatlantic relations, questioning the implications of perceived American decline and exploring what global order might emerge. Sikorski addresses the rise of right-wing nationalism within Europe, analyzing its impact on European cohesion and foreign policy. The discussion also touches on unconventional diplomatic tools, such as gastrodiplomacy, which uses culinary culture as a soft power instrument. Furthermore, Sikorski's significant social media influence, notably his presence among 'The Million-Plus Twitter Followers Club,' is highlighted as a modern platform for political discourse and public engagement. The context places this within broader discussions on diplomacy, European affairs, and the future of international relations amidst shifting global power dynamics.
result.main_content_zh: 本文介绍了一期以波兰政治家、前外交部长拉多斯瓦夫·西科尔斯基为主角的播客节目。节目探讨了核心地缘政治议题，焦点集中于跨大西洋关系的现状，质疑美国相对衰落可能带来的影响，并探讨何种全球秩序可能随之出现。西科尔斯基分析了欧洲内部右翼民族主义的兴起，及其对欧洲团结与外交政策的冲击。对话还涉及非常规外交手段，例如利用饮食文化作为软实力工具的“美食外交”。此外，文章强调了西科尔斯基在社交媒体上的显著影响力，特别是他作为“百万以上推特粉丝俱乐部”成员的平台作用，将其视为现代政治话语和公众参与的新场域。整体讨论被置于外交、欧洲事务以及全球力量格局变动下国际关系未来走向的广阔背景之中。
keywords_zh: 拉多斯瓦夫·西科尔斯基
